log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Tiefling — Armored Tank HP: 42/59
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 22 damage. Tiefling — Armored Tank HP: 20/59
--- Tiefling — Armored Tank --- HP: 20/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Tiefling — Armored Tank --- HP: 20/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
